aiInsights.headline: All systems are functioning within expected parameters, with no anomalies detected and a high performance ratio of 0.9389.
aiInsights.summary: The farm's average performance ratio of 0.9389 indicates efficient energy conversion, with a low average temperature loss of 0.0878. The battery state of charge (SOC) is at 73.6%, which is within the expected operating range. Grid import and export are balanced, with 125 kW imported and 225 kW exported, indicating a stable grid interaction. No maintenance actions are currently required. Continue routine inspections and monitoring to ensure ongoing optimal performance.

recommendations.text: Continue routine inspections and monitoring to ensure ongoing optimal performance.
